name: Vimy Resources Limited
description: Vimy Resources Limited is a Perth-based resource development company focused on the exploration and evaluation of uranium projects in Australia. The company's flagship asset is the 100% owned Mulga Rock Project, one of Australia's largest undeveloped uranium resources, located in the Great Victoria Desert of Western Australia. Additionally, Vimy holds a significant interest in the Alligator River uranium district in the Northern Territory. The company is dedicated to advancing these projects through development and operational planning to contribute to the global energy sector.
